assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Response recommends REGULAR release channel, not Stable or Extended which would better minimize upgrade frequency for long-running training workloads

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Response shows maintenance exclusion configuration with 'scope: NO_UPGRADES' which blocks disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Response configures maintenance window with specific timing (02:00 with 4h duration) and mentions 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SU' for Sunday-only maintenance

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Response clearly shows separate node pools: 'h100-training-pool' for GPU workloads and 'system-pool' for system workloads, with taints to ensure isolation

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Response configures upgradeSettings with SURGE strategy and shows manual upgrade approach with maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 to prevent automatic disruptive upgrades

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Response includes extensive checkpointing configuration with CHECKPOINT_INTERVAL, automated checkpoint triggers via CronJob, and checkpoint storage setup

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GPU driver version testing or staging validation before applying upgrades to production GPU pools

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GPUDirect/RDMA networking compatibility requirements or the need to verify compatibility before upgrades
